metadata.description: SocialForge — an open-source suite of Claude skills that turns any capable model into a full AI social-media growth agency: analysis, strategy, hooks, scripts, repurposing, trends, engagement, and an orchestrator that runs them end-to-end.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: 17 composable social-media growth skills + an orchestrator. Analyze competitors, nail your audience, generate hooks and scripts, repurpose one video into 30+, ride trends, boost engagement, and adapt across every platform. Works with Claude and any capable model.
